summary_en: 33,400 shares acquired (0.43% of shares outstanding) for ¥75.61M during May 1–14, 2026. Execution period May 1–31, 2026 at ¥226,700 average price. Cumulative acquisition under March 11, 2026 board resolution (¥200M authorization): 88,800 shares for ¥199.93M. Program completed; 11,200 shares of ¥200M authorization remain unexecuted.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition
translation_en_brief: pluszero, Inc. (TSE Growth, ticker 5132) completed its treasury stock acquisition program authorized by board resolution on March 11, 2026. The final tranche, executed May 1–14, 2026, acquired 33,400 shares at an aggregate cost of ¥75.61M (average ¥226,700 per share). This represents 0.43% of shares outstanding. Cumulative acquisition under the ¥200M authorization totals 88,800 shares for ¥199.93M. The program is now complete; approximately ¥200k of the original ¥200M authorization remains unexecuted. All acquisitions were conducted via open market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under Article 156 of the Companies Act (as applied via Article 165(3) and pursuant to articles of incorporation).
